MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, City and County of San Francisco and Defendant, Goitom Kidane appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties per the record. Trial date is vacated.
